title: monolophus jirawongsei
intro: Monolophus jirawongsei, also known as the 'Thai Krachiao', is a type of plant that belongs to the Zingiberaceae family. The plant is traditionally used in Thai medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Monolophus jirawongsei include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or capsules for its medicinal effects.
